## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Understory and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and explore new content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [5 articles published last week, 5 more slated for this week; 3 shared for review](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Indexation challenges normal for new domains; focus on user experience and intent](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Podcast summary pipeline in development; sample article coming next week](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [New content categories proposed: Go-to-Market Engineering, Paid Media, team-specific tags](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate more authentic voices through call transcripts and video content](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and SEO Progress

  - [5 articles published last week, 5 more planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Indexation challenges normal for new domains; may take 1-2 months to build momentum](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Focus on creating good content resonating with persona, experiment with structure (FAQs, TLDRs, tables)](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Looker dashboard updates pending; considering alternatives due to performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/_MPX2DR2grTAGqkseYNzbjKgdvJR2rMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
